name: Leisuretime Lightning
description: A special drink that offers a sense of ease and relaxation while maintaining a polished character. This is a masterpiece that was crafted for Clorinde with "Caramel Blaze" serving as the creative inspiration when The Honorary Knight's Cocktail Shack was in operation.\nAfter visiting Mondstadt with impressions shaped by the Tabletop Troupe, the lightning-swift Champion Duelist is especially sensitive to metallic notes, showing a clear preference for flavors with a hint of salt. In her everyday choices, she also favors drinks with a gentle tartness to cut through richness. For most bartenders, balancing these two demands would require extreme care. But after honing your craft at the Angel's Share and The Flagship, you can precisely control every note in the cup.\nTo help Clorinde get into a relaxed mood on her tour of Mondstadt, you named this drink "Leisuretime Lightning," and it has since become one of her defining memories of the city.
